text:
Witch's Diet Pills 魔女の痩せ薬 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

|

|align=center colspan="3"|Each pill makes you lose one kg. One vial contains 200 pills. Beware, as you will die if you take more than you weigh.

Summary

Witch's Diet Pills 魔女の痩せ薬 - This card allows the caster to conjure a vial of Witch's Diet Pills. With each pill that is ingested, it makes the consumer lose a kilogram of weight. Naturally, if you eat more pills than your weight, you will die. These pills make the user lose mass. This means that it either removes body fat, tissue and muscle to reduce the weight or your body does not change shape and your mass is simply reduced making you lighter.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.066 :: 魔女の痩せ薬 
１粒飲めば１kg体重が減る薬。１ビン200粒入り。体重以上の数の薬を飲むと死んでしまうので要注意。
|-
![Eng]
|No.066 :: Witch's Diet Pills 
Medicine that reduces your weight by 1KG every tablet. 200 Tablets in a bottle. So pay caution, taking more pills than your weight will make you die.
|}
